question: Was the corporation that recently acquired the stablecoin infrastructure provider BVNK originally established to compete with the card product now known as Visa?

chain.fact: Mastercard was founded as the Interbank Card Association (ICA).
The ICA was formed by a group of banks to compete with the BankAmericard.
BankAmericard was later rebranded as Visa in 1976.

role_reference: the corporation that recently acquired the stablecoin infrastructure provider BVNK

question: Is the parent company of the stablecoin platform co-founded by Jesse Hemson-Struthers headquartered in the town of Harrison, New York?

chain.fact: Jesse Hemson-Struthers is the co-founder of BVNK.
Mastercard is headquartered in Purchase, New York.
Purchase is a hamlet in the town of Harrison, New York.

role_reference: the parent company of the stablecoin platform co-founded by Jesse Hemson-Struthers
